name: Stone Hedge Golf Course
about: Stone Hedge Golf Course is a comprehensive golf facility located in Pennsylvania, offering a traditional course experience alongside modern amenities. The venue includes an 18-hole course, driving range, pro shop, and on-site dining, catering to both casual golfers and serious players. In addition to outdoor play, the facility features a dedicated golf simulator bay and hosts various events, tournaments, and weddings, indicating a versatile event space with a family-friendly atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive facility with both course and simulator options
Hosts tournaments and events for community engagement
Professional lessons and coaching available for skill development
Onsite accommodations for multi-day visits or events

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant 'The Hedge' with a full menu
Full bar service available at the on-site restaurant

simulator_hardware.notes: Simulator details not specified on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental availability, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant 'The Hedge' with a full bar and menu. BYOB policy is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Website does not specify simulator play duration, but typical simulator rounds range from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue hosts family-friendly events and mentions juniors/youth in its target audience.
